fan_out.axis_a: per-raw landing-strategy enumeration: 13 anima-DIRECT raws × 6 mandatory fields (raw_concept, landing_primary, landing_secondary, reproducer_pointer, tracking_id, witness_cycle_handle) = 78 cells. Each row independently authored from raw concept + anima dir survey; rows do not derive from one another.
fan_out.axis_b: cross-cutting pattern anchor matrix: 5 falsifier themes (counterfactual_twin, bisimulation, info_theoretic_bound, anti_fragility, bayesian_evidence) × 5 engine targets (phi_adversarial, edge_of_chaos, anima_temporal, attention_phi, holographic_substrate) × 3 dir-pressure rows (verifier/+3, anima-measurement/+2, anima-physics/+2). Aggregates raw-level decisions into directory-pressure forecast.
fan_out.axis_c: honesty disclosure layer: 4 honesty_* claims (no_implementation_in_this_cycle, tracking_ids_are_placeholder, landing_surface_existence_audit, meta_raw_exclusion) each grounded in file:line citation. Independent of axis_a content (axis_a tells you WHAT to land, axis_c tells you WHAT WAS NOT done this cycle and WHY claims are not fabricated).
fan_out.axis_d: META-raw exclusion rationale: 5 raws (112,117,118,124,126) have anima=META in source matrix; explicitly enumerated and rejected from this propagation plan with reasoning ('META rows reach anima only via lateral inheritance from primary-landing project'). Tier-1 rejection with reasoning per absorbed-alpha motif.
fan_out.correlation_estimate: 0.18 — axis_a vs axis_b correlation: axis_b summarizes axis_a's directory-pressure column, so partial-derivable, but 5×5 falsifier-theme × engine-target matrix is genuinely cross-cutting and not a one-to-one pivot of axis_a (engines absorb 1..2 raws each; falsifier themes apply to 2..4 raws each — no clean projection). axis_c independence: honesty layer cannot be derived from axis_a or axis_b without external knowledge of which directories actually exist, which engines are real, which META rows were excluded — these come from filesystem ls + matrix TSV, not from rows. axis_d independence: rejection rationale comes from matrix META cells, NOT from any DIRECT-row content.
